sourceSummary.oneLine: TFT Panel incoming inspection report form for ABZ(HME INC) 1417 Panel applied to AR-B6-1100, AR-B6-2300, and AR-B6-1300.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used by ㈜에이치앤아비즈 품질팀 to document incoming inspection acceptance criteria and OK/NG results for TFT panels.
keyPoints: Applicable models are AR-B6-1100, AR-B6-2300, and AR-B6-1300.
Part name is ABZ(HME INC) 1417 Panel with product specification 440(W) × 520(L) × 0.7(T) [mm].
Inspection categories include Mechanical, Visual, and IMAGE checks with OK/NG result fields.
Revision history lists Rev No. 0, reason 최초제정, dated 2019.07.01.

evidence.claim: The document title is TFT Panel 수입 검사 성적서.
The report is associated with ㈜에이치앤아비즈 품질팀.
evidence.evidenceText: TFT Panel 수입 검사 성적서 ... ㈜에이치앤아비즈 품질팀

evidence.claim: The applicable models are AR-B6-1100, AR-B6-2300, and AR-B6-1300.
The part name is ABZ(HME INC) 1417 Panel.
Mechanical criteria include total panel weight specification 400 min, 430 typ, and 460 max g.
Dimension criteria include horizontal 439.8 min, 440 typ, 440.2 max mm; vertical 519.8 min, 520 typ, 520.2 max mm; thickness 0.6 min, 0.7 typ, 0.8 max mm.
Visual criteria require no crack, no dent, no interface pad discoloration, stain and scratch not confirmed during image inspection, and chipping ≤ 0.5 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Visual,,Crack,,,,,-,없을 것 ... Dent,,,,,-,없을 것 ... Interface Pad,,,,,-,변색 없을것 ... Stain,,,,,-,영상 검사시 확인 안될것 ... Scratch,,,,,-,영상 검사시 확인 안될것 ... Chipping,,,,,mm,≤ 0.5

evidence.claim: Image criteria include line defect, 구동 불량, Density (32X32), Stain (3x3), Total Line, D.Class #0 through #8, T-Cluster, and Noise checks.
evidence.evidenceText: IMAGE,,Line defect ... 구동 불량 ... Density (32X32) ... Stain (3x3) ... Total Line ... D.Class #0 ... D.Class #8 ... T-Cluster ... Noise

evidence.claim: The form code/revision line is AIF801-1-3 (REV.1).
Revision history lists Rev No. 0, reason 최초제정, and date 2019.07.01.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is company quality team/general source, not an explicit external regulatory authority or jurisdiction.
Key operational metadata fields such as 성적서 No., 입고일, LOT No. / 발주번호, Panel ID, 수입 검사일, 검사원, and approval signatures are blank in the provided text.
OCR/CSV extraction contains garbled leading characters and many empty comma-separated cells.
Revision metadata may be ambiguous because the form line states AIF801-1-3 (REV.1) while revision history lists Rev No. 0.
